_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 5 Video-MME. Coverage sparse — Anthropic/OpenAI system cards do not publish Video-MME (Gemini 3 Pro model card uses Video-MMMU 87.6% instead). Only two defensible Gemini scores from April 2026 third-party aggregator; flagged as provisional.

benchmarks.name: Video-MME
benchmarks.description: 900 videos × 2,700 MCQ across short/medium/long durations (11s–1h), 6 domains. CVPR 2025. Live leaderboard at video-mme.github.io.

scores._note: April 2026 third-party aggregator: Gemini 3.1 Pro Video-MME w.o. subs 78.2% (described as 'largest gap' vs next-best 71.4%).
Provisional — not in Gemini 3 Pro model card (uses Video-MMMU 87.6 instead). Approximated from Gemini 3.1 Pro figure.
